name: create_association
description: Add a cds.Association element to an existing deployed view (SV_ or GV_) so it can navigate to a master data view. Fetches the source view CSN from Datasphere automatically — no need to supply the raw CSN. Returns a dry-run by default; set deploy=true to apply.

join_field_source.description: Foreign key column on the source view (e.g. CompanyCode).

join_field_target.description: Primary key column on the target view (e.g. Company_Code).

deploy.description: Set true to deploy after dry-run review. Requires confirm and acknowledge_ai.

confirm.description: Human confirmation flag. Must be true when deploy=true.

acknowledge_ai.description: AI literacy acknowledgement. Must be true when deploy=true.
